issues.description: Targeted validation could not be completed in this sandbox. `npm test -- src/lib/pagination.test.ts` failed during Vitest startup with `Error: spawn EPERM` while loading `vitest.config.ts`, before executing tests.
issues.recommendation: Run `npm test -- src/lib/pagination.test.ts` in an environment that permits Vitest/esbuild child-process startup.
issues.deferRationale: Environment/sandbox restriction prevented test execution; code inspection found no functional defect in the reviewed diff.
